mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_type, std_name, alias, summary, create_time, update_time FROM wiki_entity ORDER BY create_time DESC

where.if: AND (std_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR alias LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, entity_type, std_name, alias, summary, create_time, update_time FROM wiki_entity
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id,std_name FROM wiki_entity WHERE entity_type=#{type}

SELECT * FROM wiki_entity WHERE entity_type = #{type} AND ( std_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') OR #{name} LIKE CONCAT('%', std_name, '%') OR alias LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN std_name LIKE CONCAT(#{name}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CHAR_LENGTH(std_name), id LIMIT 5
